title: Battle of Onderon (Great Sith War)

{{Quote|We have reached Onderon, the former home of the dark Jedi Freedon Nadd. We will conquer this place for our Lord, Ulic Qel-Droma, as ordered.|[[Mandalore the Indomitable]]|<ref name="TOTJTSW6" />}}
The '''Battle of Onderon''' was a last-ditch effort by the [[Mandalorian Crusaders]] to secure a victory in the final stages of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] on behalf of the [[Brotherhood of the Sith]].

==Background==
Following [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma's]] orders to divert the vast bulk of his [[Mandalorian Crusaders|Crusaders]] to the [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] system, [[Mandalore the Indomitable]]'s fleet carriers took up holding orbits between the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and its nearby [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]].<ref name="TOTJTSW6" />

Dropping down from behind the moon, the Mandalorian crusaders were first spotted by [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Galia]] from her Royal Palace in the center of the walled city of [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]]. Sounding the alarm, [[King/Legends|King]] [[Oron Kira]] summoned the [[Beast Riders]] of Onderon's wilderness to meet the onrushing attack. After sending a message to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] requesting reinforcements, Oron and the other riders brought the fight back to the Mandalorians.<ref name="TOTJTSW6" />

==The battle==
{{Quote|Another humiliating defeat for the Mandalorians.|[[Rohlan Dyre]]|<ref name="Knights of the Old Republic 48">[[Knights of the Old Republic 48|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 48]]</ref>}}
In the skies of above Onderon, the Beast Riders and the Mandalorians on their [[Basilisk war droid/Legends|Basilisk war droids]] proved to be equally matched. After experiencing taunts from Oron Kira and his men, Mandalore then rallied his troops, fighting with unbridled ferocity. Just as it seemed as though the tide had turned in favor of the Mandalorians, Republic reinforcements in the form of elements of the [[Republic Swift Fleet]]<ref name="TEA" /> commanded by [[Fleet Captain/Legends|Fleet Captain]] [[Vanicus]] arrived on the battlefront, lending critical firepower to the battle.<ref name="TOTJTSW6" />

Caught between the Republic forces and the Beast Riders, the Mandalorian forces were devastated, although Vanicus at first attempted crippling the enemy ships, a feat which proved impossible due to their [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector-shielding]]. The only course of action of victory or death. Calling a retreat to the moon of Dxun, Mandalore the Indomitable believed he could lose the Republic pursuit in its dense jungles. Unfortunately for Mandalore, while retreating, a Republic frigate fired upon his Basilisk war droid, and he crashed in the forests far away from the other [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] troops. Rising from the wreckage, Mandalore was immediately set upon by two large beasts of the moon, and was subsequently devoured.<ref name="TOTJTSW6" />

==Aftermath==
Initiating a full-scale search of the moon's jungles, the remaining Mandalorians scoured the landscape for signs of their leader, but came up empty-handed. However, one shocktrooper in particular happened across the remains of Mandalore the Indomitable's mask. Placing the mask on his own head, he became the next Mandalore,<ref name="TOTJTSW6" /> [[Mandalore the Ultimate]], whose [[Mandalorian Wars|legacy]] would affect [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] for decades to come.<ref name="History of the Mandalorians">{{InsiderCite|80|The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors}}</ref>
